text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for agreeing to attend 
my birthday party.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
This will be my way of giving back to you. 
So please, enjoy tonight.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well, thank you for inviting me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In case there's anything you're unsure about,
I know my way around the venue, so don't 
hesitate to ask.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
…You're right. Sorry, it's a bad habit 
of mine. I will enjoy tonight as a guest 
and nothing more.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Yes, please look forward to it. Thanks to 
Sirius's help, everything is in order.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Tch. Quiet. You don't have to tell her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Please do, I'd love to hear more.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
She handled everything I was unsure about. 
She's even going to pilot the surprise airplane.
